notes: Batch 02 is a large, uniform set of 258 MileDown cloze cards dominated by the 'Essential Equations' deck (Physics, Gen Chem) plus Biochem/Physics concept cards; the tag breadcrumb prefixing every question/answer is the expected template element and was not treated as an error. The only true error is one card (note 1554178673134) whose Text field has no {{cN::}} deletion, so it renders Anki's 'No cloze found' message; three Thermodynamics cards leak an empty '{{c2::}}' cloze from their Extra field into the answer (warning), and seven Extra-field YouTube links have malformed hrefs (stray "/doubled quotes) that still render but point to broken URLs (info). The bulk of findings (105) are image-only cloze cards where the equation/value/unit is an image, so answer_text mirrors question_text with no textual reveal beyond a link — these are functional image-occlusion-style cards flagged as info, consistent with batches 01/03/05; no LaTeX/MathJax delimiters are used (math is rendered via images and sub/sup).
